generations.content_context: ElizaOS coin shows positive net fund flow every week since launch, yet prices continue to fall.
generations.scene_or_viz_prompt:
Three main metric panels: “Net Fund Flow” (positive bar graph, glowing cyan), “Weekly Timeline” (horizontal magenta pulse), “Price Trend” (downward orange line graph).  
Gauges: Net Flow % (circular magenta gauge), Price % Change (orange digital readout).  
Animated data flows: Pulsing cyan lines from Net Fund Flow panel connecting to Price Trend, highlighting inverse correlation.  
Color accents: main—cyan for flows/growth, magenta for activity, orange for price. All panels float as semi-transparent holograms with glowing edges.
generations.full_prompt:

VISUALIZATION TYPE: Three main metric panels: “Net Fund Flow” (positive bar graph, glowing cyan), “Weekly Timeline” (horizontal magenta pulse), “Price Trend” (downward orange line graph).  
Gauges: Net Flow % (circular magenta gauge), Price % Change (orange digital readout).  
Animated data flows: Pulsing cyan lines from Net Fund Flow panel connecting to Price Trend, highlighting inverse correlation.  
Color accents: main—cyan for flows/growth, magenta for activity, orange for price. All panels float as semi-transparent holograms with glowing edges.

ElizaOS coin shows positive net fund flow every week since launch, yet prices continue to fall.
